body:
[workspace]
members = [
  "crates/ffs-c",
  "crates/ffs-core",
  "crates/ffs-mcp",
  "crates/ffs-query-parser",
  "crates/ffs-grep",
  "crates/ffs-symbol",
  "vendor/tree-sitter-verse",
  "crates/ffs-budget",
  "crates/ffs-engine",
  "crates/ffs-cli",
]
resolver = "2"

[workspace.dependencies]
ffs-grep = { version = "0.1.11", path = "crates/ffs-grep" }
ffs-query-parser = { version = "0.1.11", path = "crates/ffs-query-parser", default-features = false }
ffs-symbol = { version = "0.1.11", path = "crates/ffs-symbol" }
ffs-budget = { version = "0.1.11", path = "crates/ffs-budget" }
ffs-engine = { version = "0.1.11", path = "crates/ffs-engine" }

# Shared dependencies
aho-corasick = "1"
ahash = "0.8"
bindet = "0.3"
blake3 = "1.8.2"
chrono = { version = "0.4", features = ["serde"] }
ctrlc = "3.4.2"
dirs = "5.0"
dunce = "1.0"
# git2 - base config without TLS (each crate adds platform-specific TLS)
git2 = { version = "0.20.2", default-features = false, features = [
  "vendored-libgit2",
] }
glidesort = "0.1"
globset = "0.4"
heed = "0.22.0"
ignore = "0.4.22"
memmap2 = "0.9"
mimalloc = "0.1.47"
zlob = "1.3.3"

neo_frizbee = { version = "0.10.2", features = ["match_end_col"] }
notify = { version = "9.0.0-rc.3" }
notify-debouncer-full = { package = "fff-notify-debouncer-full", version = "0.9.3" }
once_cell = "1.20.2"
parking_lot = "0.12"
pathdiff = "0.2.1"
rayon = "1.8.0"
regex = "1.11"
regex-syntax = "0.8"
smallvec = { version = "1.13", features = ["const_generics", "union"] }
thiserror = "2.0.10"
tracing = "0.1"

# Tree-sitter (AST symbol extraction)
tree-sitter = "0.25"
tree-sitter-language = "0.1"
tree-sitter-rust = "0.24"
tree-sitter-javascript = "0.23"
tree-sitter-typescript = "0.23"
tree-sitter-python = "0.23"
tree-sitter-go = "0.23"
tree-sitter-java = "0.23"
tree-sitter-c = "0.24"
tree-sitter-cpp = "0.23"
tree-sitter-ruby = "0.23"
tree-sitter-php = "0.24"
tree-sitter-scala = "0.24"
tree-sitter-c-sharp = "0.23"
tree-sitter-swift = "0.7"
tree-sitter-kotlin-ng = "1.1"
tree
